title: Cybersecurity Startup Acquisition
background: A technology company is considering acquiring a cybersecurity startup to expand its product suite.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Clarifies strategic rationale for the deal
Assesses market, financial, and operational attractiveness
great_answer_includes: Tests standalone value versus deal value
Quantifies revenue and cost synergy assumptions
Considers culture, systems, and execution risk
Defines diligence questions and deal breakers
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear m&a structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
